visionContent1: Our vision is to create a platform that gives people with limited financial resources the opportunity to fulfill their travel dreams while helping those in need around the world.
visionContent2: Trust is at the core of our values, followed by honesty, transparency, solidarity, and community. We are determined to gain and strengthen this among our members through fair and transparent mechanisms.
visionContent3: We look forward to you and a society that is unlike any other.
loveHeading: ONE LOVE — ONE CULTURE — ONE FAMILY
loveContent1: With every T-shirt you buy, you do something great! You not only support important charitable organizations that truly make a difference, but you also contribute to something very special: a community fund that leads our community to new adventures.
loveContent2: Imagine, we all decide together – playfully and full of excitement – where the next journey will go. These T-shirts are more than just clothing; they are the key to unforgettable experiences that we create together as a community. Be part of this exciting movement and let’s change the world together!
philosophyContent1: We surround ourselves with people who encourage us to become the best version of ourselves. We distance ourselves from drama or negative influences, such as jealousy or hatred. Instead, we focus on spreading positive energy to bring out the best in everyone.
kodexContent: This family code reflects the values and principles of our family. It serves to strengthen our relationships, clarify expectations, and shape our shared journey as a family.
codeOfConductLoveRespectContent: In our family, love and respect are at the core. We treat each other with kindness, care, and consideration.
codeOfConductOpenCommunicationContent: Open conversations and sharing thoughts and feelings are welcome. We actively listen and speak honestly and respectfully to one another.
codeOfConductSupportUnityContent: We are a team. We support each other in all aspects of life and encourage one another to pursue individual dreams and goals.
codeOfConductTimeTogetherContent: We value time together. Regular activities, such as shared outings, strengthen our bond and create memories.
codeOfConductResponsibilityContent: Every family member shares responsibility for our community. Together, we contribute to creating a comfortable environment.
codeOfConductDiversityAcceptanceContent: We welcome diversity and accept our differences. Everyone in our family is unique and respected.
codeOfConductEducationDevelopmentContent: We encourage lifelong learning and the development of our skills and interests.
codeOfConductGratitudeContent: We appreciate what we have and are thankful for the small and large joys of life.
codeOfConductConflictResolutionContent: Conflicts are natural, and we are committed to resolving them respectfully. We work together to find fair solutions for everyone.
codeOfConductSafetySecurityContent: Every member of the family contributes to safety and security. We protect ourselves from harmful influences and provide emotional support for each other.
codeOfConductCommunityServiceContent: We contribute to strengthening our community by taking responsibility for the world around us.
